summary: Full e2e testing of COVENANT: RECURSION (FPS prototype). Backend 5/5 pytest tests passed, frontend navigation + API integration verified end-to-end.

issues: Three.js console warnings: THREE.Clock deprecated (use THREE.Timer), PCFSoftShadowMap deprecated (falls back to PCFShadowMap). Non-blocking but should be cleaned up to silence console noise.

action_items: Optional: Upgrade Three.js usage (replace THREE.Clock with THREE.Timer and PCFSoftShadowMap with PCFShadowMap) to remove deprecation warnings.
Optional: Consider persisting leaderboard ordering/validation (currently POST accepts any dict without Pydantic model).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/leaderboard POST accepts arbitrary `dict` — no Pydantic validation; recommend LeaderboardUpdate model with player_name (required), kills/deaths (int).

server.py create_room endpoint always creates a new mongoose-like room on POST, but get_or_create_room is also called on websocket connect — fine, but rooms dict grows without periodic cleanup for abandoned empty rooms (only cleaned when last player disconnects via WS). Orphan rooms created via REST without WS connect stay forever.

game_loop broadcasts state every 100ms and iterates room.connections dict while potentially mutating it on disconnect — low risk but could cause RuntimeError; already mitigated by deferred disconnected list.

Frontend Lobby: direct-join-input updates `roomId` state via onChange; pressing Enter sends event.target.value directly which is fine, but the CONNECT button uses `roomId` state — works but has subtle UX inconsistency.
No data-testid for 'BACK TO MENU' button in GameView pre-lock screen — not critical since test not required, but recommend adding.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for this app
seed_data_creation: Leaderboard entry 'TEST_Commander' created during testing (kills=5, deaths=2). Safe test prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_covenant_api.py covers: GET /api/, GET /api/rooms, POST /api/rooms/create (with verify-in-list), GET /api/leaderboard, POST /api/leaderboard. All 5 pass. Frontend data-testids used: main-menu, menu-singleplayer, menu-multiplayer, menu-settings, lobby-screen, lobby-back-btn, player-name-input, create-room-btn, join-own-room-btn, direct-join-input, settings-panel, settings-back-btn, settings-tab-{controls|audio|video}, volume-slider, sensitivity-slider. Game view renders Three.js canvas (#game-canvas) with 'CLICK TO DEPLOY' prompt. Three.js pointer-lock gameplay not automated (requires real user mouse). WebSocket endpoints /ws/game/{room_id} and /ws/singleplayer not tested via automation.
rca of the issue: No issues found — all required tests pass.
